mapper.select: SELECT WAS_GROUP_ID AS "wasGroupId", WAS_GROUP_NAME AS "wasGroupName", WAS_GROUP_DESC AS "wasGroupDesc" FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP WHERE WAS_GROUP_ID = #{wasGroupId}
SELECT WAS_GROUP_ID AS "wasGroupId", WAS_GROUP_NAME AS "wasGroupName", WAS_GROUP_DESC AS "wasGroupDesc" FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP ORDER BY WAS_GROUP_ID
SELECT INSTANCE_ID FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP_INSTANCE WHERE WAS_GROUP_ID = #{wasGroupId} ORDER BY INSTANCE_ID

SELECT i.INSTANCE_ID as instanceId, i.INSTANCE_NAME as instanceName, i.INSTANCE_DESC as instanceDesc, i.INSTANCE_TYPE as instanceType, i.IP as ip, i.PORT as port, i.OPER_MODE_TYPE as operModeType FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP_INSTANCE gi INNER JOIN FWK_WAS_INSTANCE i ON gi.INSTANCE_ID = i.INSTANCE_ID WHERE gi.WAS_GROUP_ID = #{wasGroupId} ORDER BY i.INSTANCE_ID

SELECT WAS_GROUP_ID AS "wasGroupId", WAS_GROUP_NAME AS "wasGroupName", WAS_GROUP_DESC AS "wasGroupDesc" FROM ( SELECT g.WAS_GROUP_ID, g.WAS_GROUP_NAME, g.WAS_GROUP_DESC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}) AS RN FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP g
AND g.WAS_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupId} || '%'
AND g.WAS_GROUP_NAME LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupName} || '%'
AND g.WAS_GROUP_DESC LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupDesc} || '%'
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit} ORDER BY RN

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP
AND WAS_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupId} || '%'
AND WAS_GROUP_NAME LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupName} || '%'
AND WAS_GROUP_DESC LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupDesc} || '%'

SELECT WAS_GROUP_ID AS "wasGroupId", WAS_GROUP_NAME AS "wasGroupName", WAS_GROUP_DESC AS "wasGroupDesc" FROM FWK_WAS_GROUP g
AND g.WAS_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupId} || '%'
AND g.WAS_GROUP_NAME LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupName} || '%'
AND g.WAS_GROUP_DESC LIKE '%' || #{wasGroupDesc} || '%'
ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}
